enum.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_STATE
enum.description: Operational states for BOS Motor system

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_STATE_UNKNOWN
entry.description: Motor state unknown - no register data

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_STATE_RUNNING_MAINTENANCE
entry.description: Manual control mode with user-specified RPM

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_STATE_FAULT
entry.description: Motor controller fault detected, operation halted

enum.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_TARGET_STATE
enum.description: Commandable target states for BOS Motor system (values match PMC_MODB_BOS_STATE)

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_TARGET_RUNNING_MAINTENANCE
entry.description: Command controller to run in maintenance/test mode

enum.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_MOTOR_FAULTS
enum.description: Detailed motor fault flags (matches BOS protocol fault register)

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_MOTOR_FAULT_OVER_VOLTAGE
entry.description: Supply voltage exceeded safe operating limits (0x0001)

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_MOTOR_FAULT_PLUNGER
entry.description: Plunger mechanism stuck, obstructed, or position error (0x0004)

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_MOTOR_FAULT_TEMPERATURE
entry.description: Motor or controller temperature exceeded thermal limit (0x0008)

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_MOTOR_FAULT_POSITION
entry.description: Position sensor error or failed to reach target (0x0010)

enum.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_COMMAND_RESULT
enum.description: Result codes for BOS command acknowledgments

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_COMMAND_ACCEPTED
entry.description: Command accepted and queued for execution

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_COMMAND_REJECTED_INVALID_PARAM
entry.description: Command rejected due to invalid parameter value

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_COMMAND_REJECTED_FAULT
entry.description: Command rejected due to active fault condition

entry.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_COMMAND_REJECTED_INVALID_STATE
entry.description: Command rejected, cannot transit from current state to desired state

enum.name: PMC_ACTUATOR_GROUP_ID
enum.description: Id for the payload actuator group

enum.name: PMC_ACTUATOR_HARDWARE_BRAKE_STATE
enum.description: Target state of the hardware brake

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_TARGET_ITEM_NUMBER
entry.description: The specified number of target items is either 0 or exceeds the maximum number (255)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_HAS_ALREADY_BEEN_COMMITTED
entry.description: The specified configuration exists and has already been committed

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_DOES_NOT_EXIST
entry.description: The specified configuration does not exist

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_ALREADY_EXISTS
entry.description: The configuration item already exists and cannot be overwritten

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_MANY_CONFIGURATION_ITEMS
entry.description: The configuration has reached its target configuration item number so no more items may be added

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_STATION_ADDRESS
entry.description: Station address is either 0 or exceeds the maximum value (0x7F)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_RELEASE_CONSENT
entry.description: Release consent exceeds the maximum value (0xF)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_FEW_KIZ_COORDINATES
entry.description: Number of provided KIZ coordinates is below the count provided in the configuration item

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_MANY_KIZ_COORDINATES
entry.description: Number of provided KIZ coordinates exceeds the count provided in the configuration item

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_TIMESTAMPS
entry.description: Timestamps provided either incorrectly overlap or exist in the past

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_MAXIMUM_DURATION
entry.description: Maximum execution duration of the configuration item cannot be 0

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_NOT_READY
entry.description: The configuration cannot be committed as some configuration items have not been added

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_SIGNATURE_FAILURE
entry.description: The cryptographic signature representing the configuration could not be correctly resolved based on the signing key

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN_FAILURE
entry.description: The cryptographic signature representing the configuration could not be correctly resolved based on the certificate chain

enum.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_RESULT
enum.description: Result from SMC request parameter operations

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_NO_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION
entry.description: No configuration has been committed so parameters cannot be validated

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_STATION_ADDRESS
entry.description: Station address is either 0 or exceeds the maximum value (0x7F)

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_RELEASE_CONSENT
entry.description: Release consent exceeds the maximum value (0xF)

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_NO_CORRESPONDING_CONFIGURATION_ITEM
entry.description: No corresponding configuration item exists for these requested parameters

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_ALREADY_EXECUTED
entry.description: Corresponding configuration item has already been executed

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_REQUEST_DURATION_EXCEEDS_MAXIMUM_ALLOWED
entry.description: Request execution duration exceeds that allowed by the corresponding configuration item

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_IN_CONCURRENT_FLOW
entry.description: Cannot use this operation whilst acting in concurrent flow

enum.name: SMC_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS_OPERATION_RESULT
enum.description: Result from SMC concurrent element operations

entry.name: SMC_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS_OPERATION_INVALID_ELEMENT_ADDRESS
entry.description: Element address within allowed elements exceeds maximum value (0x7F)

entry.name: SMC_AUTHORISATION_SUCCESS
entry.description: The SMC authorisation operation was successful

entry.name: SMC_AUTHORISATION_PARTIAL_OK
entry.description: The ongoing SMC authorisation operation is currently ok

enum.name: PMC_ACTUATOR_CONTROLLER_FAULTS
enum.description: Bitmask definitions for motor controller faults.

entry.name: SHORT_FAULT
entry.description: Short to supply, short to ground, or shorted motor winding fault.

entry.name: UNDER_VOLTAGE_FAULT
entry.description: Under voltage, over-temp, or logic fault.

entry.name: MOTOR_STALLED_FAULT
entry.description: Motor stalled (only if stall detection and stall fault are enabled).

enum.name: PMC_ACTUATOR_SENSOR_FAULTS
enum.description: Bitmask definitions for position sensor faults.

message.name: PMC_STATUS
message.description: Status of the PMC
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch).
PMC state
PMC substate
DBS power state bitfield sent to the PMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
DBS monitor state bitfield. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Jettison power state bitfield sent to the PMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Jettison monitor state bitfield. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Deployment power state bitfield sent to the PMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Deployment monitor state bitfield. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Door power state bitfield sent to the PMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Door monitor state bitfield. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Payload enable bitfield.
Station id corresponding to the PMC interlock.
Station address send to the PMC interlock through an explicit command.
Release consent send to the PMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Station_address_in read by the PMC interlock (sent by the SMC).
Release_consent_in read by the PMC interlock (sent by the SMC). Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Indicates whether the PMC board is supplied with 24 volts (boolean value)
Indicates whether the PMC board is supplied with 48 volts (boolean value)

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS
message.description: Request to activate an individual discrete ballast
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the discrete ballast unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the dbs unit corresponds to.

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the dbs_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_JETTISON
message.description: Request to activate an individual jettison unit
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the jettison unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Maximum duration to wait until jettison monitor becomes low
Station address that the jettison unit corresponds to.

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_JETTISON_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_ACTIVATE_JETTISON message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the jettison_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the jettison activation occurred correctly based on the corresponding jettison monitor

message.name: PMC_DEPLOY
message.description: Request to deploy a single deployment unit. Completion should be tracked by looking at the deployment_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_DEPLOY_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_DEPLOY message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the deployment_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_DOOR_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state (open/closed) of a single door
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the door to operate on. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target door state
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_SET_DOOR_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_DOOR_STATE message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the door_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state (extended/retracted) of a single Mod-B release actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the release actuator to operate on. Valid values are 0-1
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target DBS release actuator state
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_DBS_RELEASE_STATE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_GATE_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state (open/closed) of a single Mod-B gate actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the gate to operate on. Valid values are 0-1
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target DBS release actuator state
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_GATE_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_DBS_GATE_STATE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_PAYLOAD_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state (enabled/disabled) of a single payload
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the payload to operate on. Valid values are 0-31.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Boolean indicating whether to enable (1) or disable (0) the payload.
Boolean indicating whether to enable payload on top of keeping the exiting interlock state. If false will clear the interlock and just set a single payload enable.

message.name: PMC_SET_PAYLOAD_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_PAYLOAD_STATE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state of the deployment actuators. Completion should be tracked by looking at the deployment_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message. This message is only accepted when the PMC is in a MAINTENANCE state
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Indicating the target deployment state
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_STATE message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the deployment_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DOOR_ACTUATOR_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single actuator of a single door without safety checks. Requires that the PMC is in a state that supports this.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the door to operate on. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Which actuator to set the position of.
Position to set the door/s to. Units: milli-inches.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DOOR_ACTUATOR_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DOOR_ACTUATOR_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_ACTUATOR_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single actuator of a single deployment unit without safety checks. Requires that the PMC is in a state that supports this.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Which deployment actuator to set the position of.
Position to set the deployment actuator/s to. Units: milli-degrees.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_ACTUATOR_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_ACTUATOR_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_DOOR_STATES
message.description: Status of the Payload module's doors
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of door 0.
Position of door 0, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of door 0, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.
State of door 1.
Position of door 1, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of door 1, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.
State of door 2.
Position of door 2, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of door 2, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.
State of door 3.
Position of door 3, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of door 3, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.

message.name: PMC_DEPLOYMENT_STATES
message.description: Status of the Payload module's deployment stations
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of deployment station 0.
Position of deployment 0, actuator 0. Units: milli-degrees.
Position of deployment 0, actuator 1. Units: milli-degrees.
State of deployment station 1.
Position of deployment 1, actuator 0. Units: milli-degrees.
Position of deployment 1, actuator 1. Units: milli-degrees.
State of deployment station 2.
Position of deployment 2, actuator 0. Units: milli-degrees.
Position of deployment 2, actuator 1. Units: milli-degrees.
State of deployment station 3.
Position of deployment 3, actuator 0. Units: milli-degrees.
Position of deployment 3, actuator 1. Units: milli-degrees.

message.name: PMC_DBS_RELEASE_STATES
message.description: Status of the release actuator on a Mod-B DBS
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of DBS release station 0.
Position of dbs release 0. Units: milli-inches.
State of DBS release station 1.
Position of dbs release 1. Units: milli-inches.

message.name: PMC_DBS_GATE_STATES
message.description: Status of the gate actuator on a Mod-B DBS
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of DBS gate station 0.
Position of dbs gate 0. Units: milli-degrees.
State of DBS gate station 1.
Position of dbs gate 1. Units: milli-degrees.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DOOR_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single door, following all safety checks.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the door to operate on. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Position to set the door/s to. Units: milli-inches.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DOOR_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DOOR_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single deployment unit's actuators following all safety checks.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Position to set the deployment actuator/s to. Units: milli-degrees.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single DBS Release actuator position.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-1.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Position to set the deployment actuator/s to. Units: milli-inches.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_GATE_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single DBS Release actuator position.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-1.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Position to set the deployment actuator/s to. Units: milli-degrees.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_GATE_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_RELEASE_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_CLEAR_STATE
message.description: Clear PMC Interlock state. Reset all the door and deployment power outputs to NOT output power
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Release consent ID for this deployment unit. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.

message.name: PMC_SET_CLEAR_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_DEPLOYMENT_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATE
message.description: Request to power a set of door / deployment actuators
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address
Release consent is required if we are changing the power state of deployment actuator groups
Bitmask of group IDs of the actuators to power on/off. IDs are defined at PMC_ACTUATOR_GROUP_ID

message.name: PMC_SET_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_ACTUATOR_POWER message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_ACTUATOR_HARDWARE_BRAKE_STATE
message.description: Request to disengage the hardware brake for a group of actuators.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address
Release consent is required if we are changing the power state of deployment actuator groups
Bitmask of group IDs of the actuators to set the hardware brake. IDs are defined at PMC_ACTUATOR_GROUP_ID
Target state of the hardware brake for all actuators in the actuator_mask

message.name: PMC_SET_ACTUATOR_HARDWARE_BRAKE_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_ACTUATOR_DISENGAGE_HARDWARE_BRAKE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE
message.description: Enable/Disable element power.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Boolean indicating whether to enable (1) or disable (0) the element power.

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgment of PMC_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event

message.name: PMC_ELEMENT_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Status of the Payload element power state
message.field: Boolean whether element power is enabled.
Last time in Coordinated Universal Time when status was received (ms since Epoch).
Last reported temperature of the DCDC element power supply in degrees C.
Last reported voltage of the DCDC element power supply in mV. Max expected voltage is ~52V.
Last reported current of the DCDC element power supply in mA. Max expected current is ~+/-24A.

message.name: PMC_DOOR_FAULTS
message.description: Status of the Payload module's doors
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.
ID of the door to operate on. Valid values are 0-3.
ID of the actuator within the door unit.

message.name: PMC_DEPLOYMENT_FAULTS
message.description: Status of the Payload module's deployment actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.
ID of the deployment unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
ID of the actuator within the deployment unit.

message.name: PMC_DOOR_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Power information of the actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Brake current of door 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of door 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of door 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of door 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of door 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of door 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of door 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of door 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of door 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of door 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of door 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.

message.name: PMC_DEPLOYMENT_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Power information of the deployment actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Brake current of deployment 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 2, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 2, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 3, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of deployment 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of deployment 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of deployment 3, actuator 1 in milliamps.

message.name: PMC_DBS_RELEASE_FAULTS
message.description: Fault status of the Payload module's DBS release actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.

message.name: PMC_DBS_GATE_FAULTS
message.description: Fault status of the Payload module's DBS gate actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.

message.name: PMC_DBS_RELEASE_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Power information of the DBS release actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Brake current of release actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of release actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of release actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of release actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of release actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of release actuator 1 in milliamps.

message.name: PMC_DBS_GATE_ACTUATOR_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Power information of the DBS gate actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Brake current of DBS gate 0 in milliamps.
Board current of DBS gate 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of DBS gate 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of DBS gate 1 in milliamps.
Board current of DBS gate 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of DBS gate 1 in milliamps.

message.name: PMC_MODB_DBS_STATES
message.description: States of the Mod-B DBS
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of DBS station 0.
Deploying substates of DBS station 0.
Fault code of DBS station 0.
State of DBS station 1.
Deploying substates of DBS station 1.
Fault code of DBS station 1.

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS_V2
message.description: Request to activate an individual discrete ballast
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the discrete ballast unit to activate. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the dbs unit corresponds to.

message.name: PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS_V2_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_ACTIVATE_DBS_V2 message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the dbs_monitor field of the PMC_STATUS message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_ANTENNA_MAST_STATE
message.description: Send a command to the PMC to set the state of the antenna mast
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
State indicating whether to (do nothing) invalid (0), raise (1), lower(2), or stop (3) the antenna mast

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_ANTENNA_MAST_STATE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the state of the antenna mast
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the mast actuator control accepted or rejected the request
The reponse from the antenna mast task describing current operating state

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_ANTENNA_MAST_ACTUATOR_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of the mast actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Position to set the mast actuator to
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_ANTENNA_MAST_ACTUATOR_POSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the position of the mast actuator
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE_V2
message.description: Enable/Disable element power.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Requested channel to set the state
Boolean indicating whether to enable (1) or disable (0) the element power.

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of PMC_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Requested channel to set the state
Result of event

message.name: PMC_ELEMENT_POWER_STATUS_V2
message.description: Status of the Payload element power state
message.field: Boolean whether element power is enabled.
Last time in Coordinated Universal Time when status was received (ms since Epoch).
Last reported voltage of the PDU channel power in mV. Max expected voltage is ~52V.
Last reported current of the DCDC channel power in mA. Max expected current is ~+/-24A.

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_STATE
message.description: Request to set the state (open/closed) of a single lift actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the lift unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target lift state

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_STATE message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the PMC_MODB_LIFT_STATES message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the position of a single lift actuator, following all safety checks.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the lift unit corresponds to.
Position to set the lift to. Units: milli-inches.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_LIFT_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_LIFT_STATES
message.description: Status of the Payload module's lift actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of lift 0.
Position of lift 0, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of lift 0, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.
State of lift 1.
Position of lift 1, actuator 0. Units: milli-inches.
Position of lift 1, actuator 1. Units: milli-inches.

message.name: PMC_MODB_LIFT_FAULTS
message.description: Status of the Payload module's lift actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bitmask indicating motor controller faults.
Bitmask indicating position sensor faults.
Bitmask indicating temperature faults.
Bitmask indicating communication faults.
Station address that the lift unit corresponds to.
ID of the actuator within the lift unit.

message.name: PMC_MODB_LIFT_POWER_STATUS
message.description: Power information of the lift actuators
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Brake current of lift 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of lift 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of lift 0, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of lift 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of lift 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of lift 0, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Brake current of lift 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Board current of lift 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Motor current of lift 1, actuator 0 in milliamps.
Brake current of lift 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Board current of lift 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.
Motor current of lift 1, actuator 1 in milliamps.

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_LIFT_HARDWARE_BRAKE_STATE
message.description: Request to disengage the hardware brake for a group of actuators.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address
Target state of the hardware brake for the lift actuators.

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_LIFT_HARDWARE_BRAKE_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_ACTUATOR_DISENGAGE_HARDWARE_BRAKE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_STATION_POSITION
message.description: Request to set the state of the station.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target station position

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_STATION_POSITION_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MODB_SET_STATION_POSITION message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the PMC_MODB_STATION_STATES message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_STATION_STATES
message.description: Status of the stations.
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of station 0.
Moving substate of station 0.
Target position of station 0.
State of station 1.
Moving substate of station 1.
Target position of station 1.

message.name: PMC_MODB_STATION_FAULTS
message.description: Fault status of the station controllers
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Fault code indicating the type of fault for station 0, if any.
Fault code indicating the type of fault for station 1, if any.

message.name: PMC_MODB_REQUEST_STATION_STANDBY
message.description: Request to turn the station off.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address referring to the target station.

message.name: PMC_MODB_REQUEST_STATION_STANDBY_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_MODB_REQUEST_STATION_STANDBY message. Completion should be tracked by looking at the PMC_MODB_STATION_STATES message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_CANFD_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry related to the status of the PMC CAN FD Port
message.field: PMC Pandion Timestamp UTC
Number of CAN transmit related errors
Number of CAN receive related errors
whether the CANFD Bus is on

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE_V3
message.description: Enable/Disable element power.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address
Requested channel to set the state
Boolean indicating whether to enable (1) or disable (0) the element power.

message.name: PMC_SET_ELEMENT_POWER_STATE_RESPONSE_V3
message.description: Acknowledgment of PMC_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Station address
Requested channel to set the state
Result of event

message.name: PMC_ELEMENT_POWER_STATUS_V3
message.description: Status of the Payload element power state
message.field: Last time in Coordinated Universal Time when status was received (ms since Epoch).
Station address
Boolean whether channel power is enabled.
Last reported voltage of the PDU channel power in mV. Max expected voltage is ~52V.
Last reported current of the DCDC channel power in mA. Max expected current is ~+/-24A.

message.name: PMC_SET_MAST_STATE_V2
message.description: Send a command to the PMC to set the state of the antenna mast
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Target state to set mast

message.name: PMC_SET_MAST_STATE_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the state of the antenna mast
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the mast actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_MAST_POSITION_V2
message.description: Request to set the position of the mast actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Position to set the mast actuator to
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target

message.name: PMC_MAINTENANCE_SET_MAST_POSITION_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the position of the mast actuator
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MAST_STATUS_V2
message.description: Status of the stations.
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of mast.
Current position.

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_DBS_STATE_V2
message.description: Send a command to the PMC to set the state of the DBS
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the DBS to operate on. Valid values are 0-1
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Target state to set DBS

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_DBS_STATE_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the state of the DBS
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the DBS actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_POSITION_V2
message.description: Request to set the position of the DBS actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the DBS to operate on. Valid values are 0-1
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Position to set the DBS actuator to
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_DBS_POSITION_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the position of the DBS actuator
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_DBS_STATES_V2
message.description: Status of the DBS.
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of DBS.
Current position for Station 0 DBS.
State of DBS.
Current position for Station 1 DBS.

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_STATION_STATE_V2
message.description: Request to set the state (open/closed) of a single station's actuators
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the station to operate on. Valid values are 0-3.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Indicating the target station state

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_STATION_STATE_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_STATION_STATE_V2 message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_STATION_POSITION_V2
message.description: Request to set the position of the Station actuator
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the station to operate on. Valid values are 0-1
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to
Position to set the Station actuator to
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target

message.name: PMC_MODB_MAINTENANCE_SET_STATION_POSITION_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgment of command sent to the PMC to set the position of the Station actuator
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
Whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_MODB_STATION_STATES_V2
message.description: Status of the DBS.
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
State of Station 0's actuators.
Current position for Station 0 Actuator 0.
Current position for Station 0 Actautor 1.
State of Station 1's actuators.
Current position for Station 1 Actuator 0.
Current position for Station 1 Actuator 1.

message.name: PMC_MODB_UNSAFE_SET_STATION_ACTUATOR_POSITION_V2
message.description: Request to set the position of a single actuator of a single station without safety checks. Requires that the PMC is in a state that supports this.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
ID of the station to operate on. Valid values are 0-1.
Station address that the deployment unit corresponds to.
Which actuator to set the position of.
Position to set the station/s to. Units: milli-inches.
Maximum movement duration in milliseconds. Control loop will turn off actuator motors by the end of the max movement duration even if actuators failed to reach the target.

message.name: PMC_MODB_UNSAFE_SET_STATION_ACTUATOR_POSITION_RESPONSE_V2
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_UNSAFE_SET_DOOR_ACTUATOR_POSITION message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request
whether the actuator control accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_SET_DEVICE_POWER_STATE
message.description: Set power state of a device
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Index of the device to set power state
Requested power state

message.name: PMC_SET_DEVICE_POWER_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_DEVICE_STATE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the pmc accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_DEVICE_POWER_CHANNEL_STATUS
message.description: Report power state of a device
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device to set power state
Index of the device, used for command
Requested power state
Current power state
Whether there is a fault with the current system
Instant voltage in milli-volts
Instant current in milli-amps
Minimum voltage in milli-volts
Minimum current in milli-amps
Maximum voltage in milli-volts
Maximum current in milli-amps
Average voltage in milli-volts
Average current in milli-amps

message.name: PMC_SET_DCDC_STATE
message.description: Set power state of a dcdc supply
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Index of the dcdc to set power state
Requested power state

message.name: PMC_SET_DCDC_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgement of PMC_SET_DCDC_STATE message.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
whether the pmc accepted or rejected the request

message.name: PMC_DCDC_STATUS
message.description: Report power state of a dcdc supply
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the contactor to set power state
Index to dcdc array, used for command
Requested dcdc state
Current dcdc state
Instant output voltage over a 10 moving window
Instant output voltage
Instant output current
Minimum output voltage over a 10 moving window
Minimum output current over a 10 moving window
Maximum output voltage over a 10 moving window
Maximum output current over a 10 moving window
Average output voltage over a 10 moving window
Average output current over a 10 moving window

message.name: PMC_PDU_TELEMETRY
message.description: Report power state of a device
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Identifier for the PDU on the Standalone Payloads Network
Temperature in degrees of the PDU
Humidity measured by the PDU
Pressure measured bu the PDU

message.name: SMC_STATUS
message.description: Status of the SMC
message.field: Timestamp of when the event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch).
SMC state
SMC substate
Current understanding of vehicle time in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch).
Current understanding of vehicle latitude (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Current understanding of vehicle longitude (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Station address send to the SMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 7 bits are valid.
Release consent send to the SMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Indicates whether the SMC board is supplied with 24 volts (boolean value)
UUID corresponding to the currently committed configuration
Station address defined by the requested parameters. Only the lowest 7 bits are valid.
Release consent defined by the requested parameters. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Maximum duration that these requested parameters are applicable for
8-bit ID number corresponding to the configuration item being executed
Maximum execution duration of the configuration item being executed

message.name: SMC_NEW_CONFIGURATION
message.description: Requests the creation of a new SMC configuration that will store various items required for authorising payload engagement
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of this configuration that will be used to reference it in later messages
Number of items intended to be stored in this configuration

message.name: SMC_NEW_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC new configuration request message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the SMC new configuration operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CONFIGURATION_ITEM
message.description: Appends a new SMC configuration item that will detail the station address, release consent and conditions required for its activation
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration that this item will be added to
Sequence number for this configuration item
Station address that this configuration item will apply to
Release consent that this configuration item will apply to
Number of latitude/longitude points that define the KIZ in counter clock-wise order
Series of latitudes that are the first value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Series of longitudes that are the second value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can be executed
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can no longer be executed
Duration (in milliseconds since epoch) of the maximum time that this item can remain executed

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append configuration item message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the SMC append configuration item operation

message.name: SMC_COMMIT_CONFIGURATION
message.description: Commits a specific configuration so that its corresponding items may be executed provided the correct conditions
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration that will be committed

message.name: SMC_COMMIT_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC commit configuration message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC commit configuration operation

message.name: SMC_SET_REQUEST_PARAMETERS
message.description: Requests parameters corresponding to a configuration item with the intent on executing that item
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address corresponding to a specific configuration item
Release consent corresponding to a specific configuration item (can be 0 depending on desired function requirements)
Duration (in milliseconds since epoch) that these parameters can remain active

message.name: SMC_SET_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC set request parameters message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC set request parameters operation
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_REQUEST_PARAMETERS
message.description: Clear parameters that were requested previously
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC clear request parameters message.
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC clear request parameters operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_SIGNATURE
message.description: Appends a cryptographic signature based on the serialised version of a specific configuration
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration this signature corresponds to
Total size in bytes of this signature
Byte offset relative to the total signature size. Used to track transfer progress of the signature.
Bytes comprising the signature starting from a certain offset. It has a max limit of 251 bytes with any remaining sent through subsequent messages.

message.name: SMC_APPEND_SIGNATURE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append signature message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC append signature operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN
message.description: Appends a certificate chain based on one or more signing keys
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration this certificate chain corresponds to
Total size in bytes of this certificate chain
Byte offset relative to the total certificate chain size. Used to track transfer progress of the certificate chain.
Bytes comprising the certificate chain starting from a certain offset. It has a max limit of 251 bytes with any remaining sent through subsequent messages.

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append certificate chain message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC append certificate chain operation

message.name: SMC_SET_CLEAR_STATE
message.description: Clear SMC Interlock state. Reset the station address and release consent
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_SET_CLEAR_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC set clear state message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Whether the interlock accepted or rejected the request

message.name: SMC_SET_TEST_ROOT_CERTIFICATE
message.description: Sets test root certificate for testing
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Total size in bytes of this root certificate
Byte offset relative to the total root certificate size. Used to track transfer progress of the root certificate.
Bytes comprising the root certificate starting from a certain offset. It has a max limit of 233 bytes with any remaining sent through subsequent messages.

message.name: SMC_SET_TEST_ROOT_CERTIFICATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC set test root certificate message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC set test root certificate operation

message.name: SMC_SWITCH_ROOT_CERTIFICATE
message.description: Switch to either default or custom root certificaten for testing
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Use default or custom root certificate (boolean value)

message.name: SMC_SWITCH_ROOT_CERTIFICATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC switch root certificate message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC switch root certificate operation

message.name: SMC_SET_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS
message.description: Sets list of concurrent elements
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
List of allowed elements
Number of allowed elements
Duration that they can remain active for

message.name: SMC_SET_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC set concurrent elements message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC set concurrent elements operation

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS
message.description: Clear active list of allowed elements and requested parameters
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_CONCURRENT_ELEMENTS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC clear concurrent elements message.
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC clear concurrent elements operation

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_CONFIGURATION
message.description: Wipes any pending or committed configurations and requests to the SMC
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC clear configuration message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_BOS_STATE
message.description: Command to set the operational state of the BOS Motor. When in FAULT state, set clear_faults=1 to transition to READY state. Set maintenance_mode=1 to enter RUNNING_MAINTENANCE state.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address (0 or 1)
Motor demand setpoint (0-127, where 0=off, 127=max)
Motor speed setpoint (-3600 to +3600 RPM, negative=reverse), rpm = 0 for READY, rpm != 0 for RUNNING states
Clear all motor faults (boolean, 0=no, 1=yes). Required to transition from FAULT state to READY state.
Enable maintenance/test mode (boolean, 0=normal operation, 1=maintenance mode). When 1 with speed_rpm!=0, transitions to RUNNING_MAINTENANCE state.

message.name: PMC_MODB_SET_BOS_STATE_RESPONSE
message.description: Acknowledgment of BOS state change command
message.field: Request ID from command
Station address
Command acceptance result

message.name: PMC_MODB_BOS_TELEMETRY
message.description: Periodic status telemetry of a single BOS Motor system with statistics
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Station ID for this BOS Motor (0 or 1)
Current operational state
Age of motor controller data in milliseconds
Motor serial number
Motor firmware version
Latest demand setpoint (0-127)
Latest speed setpoint (±3600 RPM)
Latest actual demand value (0-127)
Minimum actual demand value (0-127)
Mean actual demand value (0-127)
Maximum actual demand value (0-127)
Latest actual motor speed (±3600 RPM)
Minimum actual motor speed (±3600 RPM)
Mean actual motor speed (±3600 RPM)
Maximum actual motor speed (±3600 RPM)
Latest motor torque (raw units)
Minimum motor torque (raw units)
Mean motor torque (raw units)
Maximum motor torque (raw units)
Latest bus voltage in 0.1V units (e.g., 480 = 48.0V)
Minimum bus voltage in 0.1V units (e.g., 480 = 48.0V)
Mean bus voltage in 0.1V units
Maximum bus voltage in 0.1V units
Latest motor current in 0.1A units (e.g., 150 = 15.0A)
Minimum motor current in 0.1A units (e.g., 150 = 15.0A)
Mean motor current in 0.1A units
Maximum motor current in 0.1A units
Controller temperature in 0.1°C units (e.g., 450 = 45.0°C)
Fault status bitmask

message.name: PMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a state transition as defined by a state and substate
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: PMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of PMC_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event

message.name: SMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a state transition as defined by a state and substate
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of SMC_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: The request_id field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event

message.name: SMC_QUERY_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION_REQUEST
message.description: Query all loaded SMC configurations
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_QUERY_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to query all loaded SMC configurations
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
UUID of the configuration
Total number of SMC configuration items to follow

message.name: SMC_QUERY_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_REQUEST
message.description: Query all loaded SMC configurations
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration
Sequence number for the requested configuration item

message.name: SMC_QUERY_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_RESPONSE
message.description: Additional response to query all loaded SMC configurations
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this message is in response to
Signals if the rest of the reply contain a valid item
Sequence number for this configuration item
Station address that this configuration item will apply to
Release consent that this configuration item will apply to
Number of latitude/longitude points that define the KIZ in counter clock-wise order
Series of latitudes that are the first value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Series of longitudes that are the second value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count (degrees expressed in 1e7)
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can be executed
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can no longer be executed
Duration (in milliseconds since epoch) of the maximum time that this item can remain executed

message.name: PMC_PM16DO_STATUS
message.description: Telemetry status for PM16DO GPIO expander modules providing element power control
message.field: Timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Bit-packed channel states (bit 0 = channel 1, bit 19 = channel 20). 0=OFF, 1=ON
Module 1 successful operations count
Module 1 timeout error count
Module 1 CRC error count
Module 1 transport error count
Module 1 last successful communication timestamp (ms since boot)
Module 1 online status (0=offline, 1=online)
Module 2 successful operations count
Module 2 timeout error count
Module 2 CRC error count
Module 2 transport error count
Module 2 last successful communication timestamp (ms since boot)
Module 2 online status (0=offline, 1=online)
Last operated channel number (0-255)
Last requested state (0=OFF, 1=ON)
Last operation response code
Last operation response timestamp (ms since boot)
Operation in progress (0=idle, 1=busy)
Number of configured PM16DO modules (1-2)

message.name: SMC_CONCURRENT_LIST
message.description: Status of current concurrent list
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
List of allowed elements
Number of elements returned
Duration that they can remain active for

message.name: SMC_ACTIVE_LIST
message.description: Status of current concurrent items
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
List of element stations requested
Number of elements currently requested (in active list)
